feature: Phase 725: Enterprise Readiness Program Dead Click Tripwire Hardening
notes: Added a stable root command, pnpm qa:tripwire:source, that runs the source-level dead-click scanner with the correct repo-root working directory while reusing the app-local tsx binary.
The previous delegated command executed from apps/api and falsely reported Scanned: 0 files; the corrected entrypoint now scans 110 files.
Disabled clinician-facing buttons in Immunizations, Intake, Labs, Messaging Tasks, Inbox, and patient search now expose explanatory title tooltips instead of silent disablement.
Verification: pnpm qa:tripwire:source reports Errors: 0 and Warnings: 0 on commit 7bb5e26dfeaadc9e54a89a011d29b4a8b07ff1d9
